allow: Bash(brew install:*)

spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rusnas@10.10.10.72 "ls /usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/ && echo --- && ls /usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/js/ 2>/dev/null && cat /usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/manifest.json"
expect "password:"
send "kl4389qd\\r"
expect eof
' 2>&1)

spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rusnas@10.10.10.72 "find /usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/ -type f"
expect "password:"
send "kl4389qd\\r"
expect eof
' 2>&1)

set timeout 30
spawn scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -r rusnas@10.10.10.72:/usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/* /Users/dvl92/projects/RusNAS/cockpit/rusnas/
expect "password:"
send "kl4389qd\\r"
expect eof
' 2>&1)

Bash(git add:*)

spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rusnas@10.10.10.72 "echo Port: && grep -E \\"^ListenAddress|^Port\\" /etc/ssh/sshd_config 2>/dev/null; ss -tlnp | grep cockpit || ss -tlnp | grep 900"
expect "password:"
send "kl4389qd\\r"
expect eof
' 2>&1)

Bash(expect -c '
spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rusnas@10.10.10.72 "ss -tlnp | grep 9090; systemctl is-active cockpit"
expect "password:"

expect eof
' 2>&1)
Bash(./deploy.sh 2>&1)

Bash(expect -c '

send "kl4389qd\\r"

' 2>&1)
